topics.title: U.S.–Israel war with Iran enters fifth day
topics.summary: The conflict between the United States, Israel, and Iran has escalated rapidly with strikes, missile and drone launches, and warnings across the region. Leaders are facing pressure to prevent a wider regional war while protecting civilians.
topics.why_it_matters: A larger conflict could disrupt energy supplies, raise global prices, increase risks to civilians, and pull more countries into the fighting.

sources.title: Search: US Israel Iran war March 2026

topics.title: Gulf countries on edge as the conflict spreads
topics.summary: Gulf countries are trying to protect their security and economies while avoiding being pulled into the conflict. Some host U.S. forces, many depend on stable shipping routes, and governments are balancing alliances with regional stability.
topics.why_it_matters: The Gulf is central to energy and global trade. Instability can affect fuel prices, supply chains, and regional security.

sources.title: Search: Gulf countries response Iran Israel US conflict

topics.title: Congress debates war powers and U.S. involvement
topics.summary: Lawmakers are debating whether the president can continue major military action without explicit congressional authorization. Supporters argue the U.S. must deter threats; critics warn about escalation and insist Congress should set limits.
topics.why_it_matters: This affects how long the U.S. stays involved, what goals are set, and how the Constitution’s war powers are applied.

sources.title: Search: Congress war powers Iran March 2026

topics.title: Trump news: foreign policy decisions and political fallout
topics.summary: Trump’s handling of the conflict is shaping debate in U.S. politics. Supporters say the approach shows strength; critics question strategy, costs, and long-term risks. The issue is becoming a major political dividing line.
topics.why_it_matters: Foreign policy decisions can influence elections, public opinion, and how Congress responds to future crises.

sources.title: Search: Trump Iran war politics March 2026

topics.title: Republicans vs Democrats: early 2026 primaries and what they signal
topics.summary: Early primaries can reveal what party voters prioritize and which messages are gaining traction. Candidates often appeal to core voters first, then shift toward swing voters closer to the general election.
topics.why_it_matters: The 2026 midterms will decide control of Congress, shaping budgets, investigations, and domestic and foreign policy.

topics.title: Welcome — What is frwhatsgoingon?
topics.summary: frwhatsgoingon is a student-friendly site that explains current events in simple language and links to real sources.
topics.why_it_matters: You can use it to understand breaking news and get sources for schoolwork.
